title: Pan-Seared Ukrainian-Style Tomatoes
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring pan-seared tomatoes infused with Ukrainian flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the sliced tomatoes and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they start to release their juices.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stir in the chopped fresh dill.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
